metadata.title: AS-Checkmarx-SAST-Ingestion
metadata.description: This playbook ingests Checkmarx SAST scan findings into a custom Microsoft Sentinel table on a daily schedule. This single template deploys the custom Log Analytics table, Data Collection Endpoint, Data Collection Rule, Key Vault API connection, Logic App, and all required role assignments.
prerequisites: 1. A Key Vault secret containing the Checkmarx client secret or refresh token
postDeployment: 1. Allow up to 10 minutes for role assignments to propagate
2. Enable the Logic App (deployed in Disabled state) and run it to backfill

metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace where the custom table will be created
Full resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace
Azure region of the Log Analytics workspace (used for the DCE and DCR; may differ from the resource group region)
Name of the Key Vault containing the Checkmarx refresh token
Resource group containing the Key Vault
Name of the Key Vault secret containing the Checkmarx client secret or refresh token
Name of the Data Collection Endpoint. Override the default if deploying multiple ingestion playbooks into the same resource group to avoid name collisions.
Name of the Data Collection Rule. Override the default if deploying multiple ingestion playbooks into the same resource group to avoid name collisions.
Checkmarx IAM base URL for authentication (e.g., https://us.iam.checkmarx.net, https://eu.iam.checkmarx.net)
Checkmarx AST base URL for API calls (e.g., https://us.ast.checkmarx.net, https://eu.ast.checkmarx.net)
Checkmarx tenant/realm name used in the authentication URL
OAuth grant type. Use 'refresh_token' with a refresh token, or 'client_credentials' with a client secret stored in Key Vault.

Number of days prior to each run to pull completed Checkmarx scans from. Default is 2. Set higher for an initial backfill, then reduce for steady-state daily operation. Can be changed later by editing the FromDate variable in the Logic App's Initialize_Variables action.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Populated by the DCR transform at ingestion. Declared here because Sentinel custom tables require it (MSG 1005). NOT declared in the DCR stream declaration and NOT populated in the Logic App Select — the transform is the single source of truth.

columns.name: QueryID
columns.description: ID of the query that found the vulnerability

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: Severity level (CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, INFO)

columns.name: FirstFoundAt
columns.description: When the vulnerability was first found

columns.name: FoundAt
columns.description: When the vulnerability was found in this scan

columns.name: FirstScanID
columns.description: ID of the first scan that found this vulnerability

columns.name: SourceLine
columns.description: Line number in the source file

columns.name: SourceColumn
columns.description: Column number in the source file

columns.name: NodeCount
columns.description: Number of nodes in the vulnerability path

columns.name: NodesJson
columns.description: JSON representation of the data flow nodes

columns.name: ProjectName
columns.description: Name of the Checkmarx project, sourced from the top-level scan payload

columns.name: Initiator
columns.description: User or system that initiated the scan, sourced from the top-level scan payload
